creator: maniactraq@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #1)

Thanks for pointing out the DEFAULT_VERSIONS error. I thought I had it set to 8.1 but maybe I forgot to save or something.

That log was from poudriere however, I get the exact same error when installing from ports in a clean install of FreeBSD and with nothing at all in make.conf. And all the other ports listed below give the same error saying either dom.so or pdo.so do not exist.

I can try to build again via ports and post that log if that helps but it essentially says the exact same thing as poudriere.
